audit_items.proof_trace: putback_char contains no pointer dereferences to heap-allocated memory; it only manipulates value-type struct members (json_offset: size_t, loc/prev_loc: Location, has_prev_loc: bool). The only heap pointer in Context (json_data) is never accessed in this function — only read_char dereferences it. destroy_context (which frees json_data) is called after parse_commands returns, so json_data cannot be freed while putback_char executes.
